advantages.title: Healthcare Specialization
advantages.description: Ready-made blocks and templates for clinics, doctors, pharmacies, labs — no need to adapt a generic builder.

advantages.title: Compliance Ready
advantages.description: Built-in sections for licenses, privacy policy, and personal data processing.

advantages.title: Online Patient Booking
advantages.description: Built-in booking form configured to doctor schedules and sends notifications.

advantages.title: SEO for Healthcare
advantages.description: Meta tag templates and page structure optimized for medical services search.

advantages.title: Trust Blocks
advantages.description: Blocks for reviews, certificates, awards, and doctor teams increase visitor-to-patient conversion.

advantages.title: Quick Start
advantages.description: Describe your organization — AI populates the site with copy and structure. Edit in the visual editor.

how_it_works.title: Choose Medical Organization Type
how_it_works.description: Clinic, doctor, lab, or pharmacy — AI will select the optimal structure.

how_it_works.title: Fill in Data
how_it_works.description: Add doctors, services, prices, and contacts through a simple code-free editor.

how_it_works.title: Publish Site
how_it_works.description: Click Publish — the site is immediately accessible to patients online.

faq.question: How does a medical builder differ from a regular one?
faq.answer: Ready-made blocks for doctors, schedules, licenses, and online booking — no need to build from scratch with generic components.

faq.question: Is it suitable for a solo private practice doctor?
faq.answer: Yes, the builder works equally well for a large clinic or a private practice physician.

faq.question: Can I create multiple websites for different specialties?
faq.answer: Yes, on paid plans you can manage multiple websites from a single account.

faq.question: How does the builder help with SEO?
faq.answer: Automatically generates meta tags, headings, and page structure optimized for search.

faq.question: Are technical skills required to use the builder?
faq.answer: No. The entire process is visual — describe in words, and AI and the editor do the rest.

faq.question: What's included in the free plan?
faq.answer: Website creation and publishing, basic blocks, contact form, and hosting on Promto subdomain.

cta_mid_subtitle: Create a medical website in 5 minutes — no code and no designer.
cta_final_subtitle: Launch your medical organization website for free right now.
